user.title: Connect to PocketSmith
user.description: Enter your PocketSmith developer key. You can find it under PocketSmith → Settings → API.

error.invalid_auth: Invalid developer key. Please check and try again.
error.insufficient_permissions: Your developer key doesn't have the required permissions. In PocketSmith, go to Settings → API and ensure your key has read access.
error.cannot_connect: Unable to reach the PocketSmith API. Check your network connection.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Check the Home Assistant logs.

init.title: PocketSmith Options
init.description: Configure how PocketSmith analyses your budget data.

data_description.period: The time period to use for budget analysis — weeks, months or years.
data_description.interval: How many periods to group together, e.g. interval 2 with months = fortnightly.
